article_id: 1. Responsibilities of the Institutions of Bosnia and Herzegovina.
text_snippet: The following matters are the responsibility of the institutions of Bosnia and Herzegovina: a. Foreign policy. b. Foreign trade policy. c. Customs policy. d. Monetary policy as provided in Article VII

Bosnia and Herzegovina shall be a democratic state, which shall operate under the rule of law and with free and democratic elections.

article_id: 3. Law and Responsibilities of the Entities and the Institutions.
text_snippet: a. All governmental functions and powers not expressly assigned in this Constitution to the institutions of Bosnia and Herzegovina shall be those of the Entities. b. The Entities and any subdivisions
